message.thinking:
We need to answer 3 questions. For each, produce JSON object with fields: question: "Chapters", "Description", "Structure". Provide feedback text, and complies boolean.

We need to evaluate the given text. The text says: "Ievads ietver trīs daļas: 1. Tēmas aktualitātes pamatojums un/vai pētījuma motivācija. 2. Noslēguma darba mērķis un tā sasniegšanai izvirzītie uzdevumi. 3. Īss katras noslēguma darba nodaļas un pielikumu satura apraksts. Ievada apjoms ir 1–2 lappuses."

We need to evaluate:

1. Chapters: Does the text list the main sections of the thesis? The text lists three parts of the introduction, not the main sections of the thesis. So it does not list main sections of thesis. So compliance false. Feedback: It lists introduction parts, not thesis main sections.

2. Description: Does the text briefly describe contents of each section? It describes the content of each of the three introduction parts. So yes, it briefly describes each. So compliance true. Feedback: It provides brief description of each intro part.

3. Structure: Can it be easily understood what is the general structure of the thesis just from this text? The text only describes introduction structure, not overall thesis structure. So cannot understand general structure. So compliance false. Feedback: Only intro parts described; overall thesis structure not evident.

Return JSON array with three objects.

Make sure JSON array with exactly 3 objects. Each object has keys: question, feedback, complies.

Let's craft.
